nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 满洲 (地名)
nodes.summary: 满洲 (地名)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括中华秋沙鸭、花田鸡、斑胁田鸡等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 红颈苇鹀
nodes.summary: 红颈苇鹀（Ochre-rumped bunting，学名 Emberiza yessoensis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于满洲 (地名)，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Manchuria, Korea and Japan

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitats are temperate grassland and swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. In South Korea it is classified as an endangered species

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitats are temperate grassland and swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. In South Korea it is classified as an endangered species

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its natural habitats are temperate grassland and swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. In South Korea it is classified as an endangered species
